backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the game backend, defining data types and logic for characters, items, and marketplace, with authorization, blob storage, and user profile management mixins included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—HP preservation on character re-select and player/enemy attack tick rate constants—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every component, hook, engine, and data file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Abyss Ascendant React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component orchestrating authentication, character selection, screen navigation, dungeon flow, and HP persistence—saving current HP to the backend before returning to the character select screen.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Modal component for selecting and toggling character abilities up to the character's total ability point limit, grouped and filtered by archetype with a confirm/close callback interface.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, realm, and allocate stat points, then generating starter equipment and persisting the character via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Displays a list of existing characters with health bars and delete controls, handles loading/error states, and provides navigation to character selection or creation.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Renders a detailed character sheet showing stats, XP progress, abilities, and realm/status info, with modals for spending unallocated stat and ability points.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs a dungeon combat simulation on mount, animates the combat log line-by-line, then saves results to the backend and calls completion or death callbacks.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: Lets the player choose a monster level via slider or input and start a dungeon run, displaying XP/drop rate info and any pending loot from the previous run.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Reusable health bar component that renders a colored progress bar with HP numbers in both compact and standard sizes.
Renders a tabbed inventory UI (Inventory, Stash, Equipped) allowing the player to view, select, equip/unequip, and move items between tabs using action buttons and ItemCard components.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Displays a styled tooltip card for a GeneratedItem showing its rarity, type, base stats, and affixes with icons and color-coded labels.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Shows a mock leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, listing top characters by rank, level, XP, and status using hardcoded placeholder data.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: A modal dialog that lets the player allocate unspent stat points (STR, DEX, INT, VIT) earned on level-up, then confirms the updated base stats.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Renders the game's login/landing page with Internet Identity authentication, a branded logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: React component for a player marketplace with browse and sell tabs, allowing users to list inventory items for sale at a set price and buy listings from other players using mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar component displaying the character name, level, realm, health bar, and nav links to all major game screens, plus logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Static placeholder screen for the Professions feature (Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, Gathering) showing a 'Coming Soon' message with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces new users to choose a validated adventurer username (2–20 alphanumeric characters) before proceeding, saving it via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Static placeholder screen for the Shrines of Power feature showing four shrine types with animated icons and a 'Coming Soon' badge.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress toward the next level as a styled progress bar, supporting both compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a static array of combat abilities (e.g., Power Strike, Fireball, Backstab) with damage multipliers, scaling stats, cooldowns, and display metadata.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines the MonsterTemplate interface and an array of 10 monster templates with base stats, plus utility functions for generating randomized monster display names using prefix/suffix pools.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the turn-based combat simulation engine, calculating player and monster damage, defense, attack intervals, loot drops, and XP rewards across a dungeon encounter.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Generates randomized loot items with rarity-weighted rolls, level-scaled affix values, and item-type-specific stat pools for weapons, armor, and trinkets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHealthRegen.ts: React hook that regenerates player HP at 2 HP/second while out of combat, syncing to the backend periodically and when full health is reached.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: React hook that merges backend character data with localStorage-persisted client-side state (inventory, abilities, equipped items), initializing starter equipment for new characters.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including character CRUD, HP setting, dungeon results, stat spending, and user profile management. Exports custom error classes like CharacterLimitReachedError for typed error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Inter), and defines CSS custom properties for the dark fantasy theme including colors for surfaces, rarity tiers, and health bars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting to the root DOM element.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines core game TypeScript types (stats, characters, combat results) and exports pure utility functions for level/XP calculations, max HP, stat points, and ability points as single sources of truth.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with CSS variable-based colors (including rarity and health bar colors), custom fonts, border radii, and animations like pulse-glow and accordion transitions.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for Abyss Ascendant documenting architectural notes, known issues (HP reset on character select, incorrect attack tick rate), existing features, and pending fix requests AR-1 and AR-2.
